papers.title: KiDS-450: cosmological parameter constraints from tomographic weak gravitational lensing
papers.journal: Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
papers.abstract: We present cosmological parameter constraints from tomographic weak gravitational lensing using 450 square degrees of KiDS imaging. The analysis constrains S8, Omega_m, and sigma8, and models intrinsic alignments, photometric redshift uncertainties, shear calibration, and baryonic feedback uncertainties.

papers.title: Dark Energy Survey Year 3 Results: Cosmological Constraints from Cosmic Shear
papers.abstract: DES Y3 cosmic shear measurements from tomographic weak lensing constrain S8, Omega_m, and sigma8 while modeling intrinsic alignments, photometric redshift uncertainty, and shear calibration systematics. The analysis compares inferred structure growth with Planck CMB constraints.

extracted_text_by_key.10.1093/mnras/stw2805: KiDS-450 analyzes tomographic weak gravitational lensing and reports constraints on S8, Omega_m, and sigma8 with explicit treatment of intrinsic alignment, photometric redshift uncertainty, shear calibration, and baryonic feedback uncertainty.
extracted_text_by_key.10.1103/PhysRevD.105.023520: DES Y3 cosmic shear analysis reports updated constraints on S8, Omega_m, and sigma8, modeling intrinsic alignment, photometric redshift uncertainty, and shear calibration while testing consistency with CMB-inferred structure growth amplitude.
